title: Reordering columns on My Work
excerpt: Is there a way to reorder the columns on my work? I only want to see the item, status and the date, not the group, the person or the board name. Thx.

posts.author: Loti (Loti C Woods)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to reorder the columns on my work? I only want to see the item, status and the date, not the group, the person or the board name. Thx.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@Loti,
Yes, you can reorder the columns on your work. To do this, follow these steps:
Select “Columns”
Drag and drop the columns to the order you want.

You can hide all columns except for the ones you want to see by clicking on the “Hide all columns” button

image1360×768 110 KB

For further implementation details kindly connect us:
MSquare Support
Visit us here
Youtube Channel

posts.author: Loti (Loti C Woods)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks so much for the response but my question is specifically for the My Work space. The columns wil not move around by dragging them. Do you know if there is another way to reorder or hide the columns on My Work? I so appreciate your help.

posts.author: Hannah_Albert (Hannah Albert)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also like to see this feature come to life. My team has been requesting to be able to only see item, status, date in the mywork area as well. It would be great to be able to reorder those columns or hide certain ones

posts.author: kellyg (Kelly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Confirming what Loti and Hannah said — this is not currently available. On the My Work landing page I have a huuuuge column that auto-expands to fill too much space with the name of the task, then a comment clickable, button, then Group (which I don’t really need), then Board (which I don’t need), then People (which I REALLY don’t need, it’s my work!), then date (YES!), status (YES!) and priority (YES!)

When I try to click & drag to reorder the columns I can’t (even though I can on other boards, and when I click on customize I can’t customize the order

Given I’d expect My Work to be a core place people go to manage their work, I’m really surprise this page doesn’t have these basic customization features
